title: Aquarius major
intro: However, I found that the plant you're referring to might be "Aquilaria malaccesssis" is more commonly known as  "African eaglewood" or "African aloeswood" but the most famous species is  "Aquilaria agallocha" is known as the "Aloeswood", "Agarwood", or "Oud". The Aquilaria species are a type of resinous heartwood-producing tree, belonging to the family Thymelaeaceae. The health benefits of Aquilaria major include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce stress and promote overall well-being. The bioactive constituents of this plant include sesquiterpenes, coumarins, and phenolic compounds, and it is commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The most common herbal preparations made with Aquilaria major include essential oils, extracts, and resin, which are used in aromatherapy, skincare products, and traditional medicine.
